top_signals.title: A War of Words Sends Brent Crude to a Two-Month Low
top_signals.summary: Oil prices slid to a two-month low as conflicting signals from Washington and Tehran fueled uncertainty over a potential U.S.-Iran deal, keeping traders on edge throughout a volatile week. Friday, June 12, 2026 In a particularly volatile trading week, the allocation of roles between Iran and the United States seemed to have switched constantly. If an impending deal was announced by US President Trump, Tehran would deny it, and reversely if the Iranian leadership broke the media silence with talks of a breakthrough, Trump would castigate them for…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
